title: Central government notifies appointment of 7 additional Kerala High Court judges as permanent judges
description: The Central Government has notified the appointment of seven additional judges of the Kerala High Court as permanent judges.As per a Central government notification dated March 2, 2026, the following judges have been made permanent:Justice Abdul Hakhim Mullappally Abdul Aziz,Justice Syam Kumar Vadakke Mudavakkat,Justice Harisankar Vijayan Menon,Justice Manu Sreedharan Nair,Justice Easwaran Subramani,Justice Manoj Pulamby Madhavan, andJustice Marakkaparambil Bhargavan SnehalathaJustice MA Abdul H
